# aisia_agent (Resource)

Agent AISIA orchestré — gère l'état `enabled` via POST /admin/agents/{code}/toggle. Lecture via GET /admin/agents/{code}.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aisia_agent" "example" {
  body = jsonencode({
    # payload create/update — voir schéma OpenAPI : https://api.aisia.fr/docs
  })
}

output "entity_id" {
  value = aisia_agent.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `code` (String) Code agent (ex. `agent_devops`, `devops`).

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Agent activé (persisté Redis + orchestrateur).

### Read-Only

- `json` (String) Dernière réponse GET /admin/agents/{code} (JSON).

<!-- TF-DOCS-ENRICH:09_publications -->
